idempiere.Name: TW Invoice Tax System
idempiere.Description: Taiwan Unified Invoice and Business Tax System
idempiere.Author: TW iDempiere Community

AD_EntityType.Name: Taiwan Invoice Tax System
AD_EntityType.Description: Taiwan Unified Invoice and Business Tax System

AD_Reference.Name: TW_InvoiceType
AD_Reference.Description: Taiwan Invoice Type: B2B Tripart or B2C Bipart

AD_Reference.Name: TW_AdjustmentDirection
AD_Reference.Description: Taiwan Adjustment Direction: Sales or Purchase

AD_Table.Name: Taiwan Invoice Prefix 發票字軌
AD_Table.Description: Taiwan Ministry of Finance assigned invoice prefix ranges

AD_Column.Name: 字軌代號
AD_Column.Description: Two-character invoice prefix code assigned by Ministry of Finance

AD_Column.Name: 發票類型
AD_Column.Description: Invoice type: Tripart (B2B) or Bipart (B2C)

AD_Column.Name: 字軌起始日期
AD_Column.Description: Start date of invoice prefix validity period

AD_Column.Name: 字軌結束日期
AD_Column.Description: End date of invoice prefix validity period

AD_Column.Name: 起始號碼
AD_Column.Description: First invoice number in this prefix range

AD_Column.Name: 結束號碼
AD_Column.Description: Last invoice number in this prefix range

AD_Column.Name: 目前號碼
AD_Column.Description: Current invoice number (next to be issued)

AD_Column.Name: 最後發票號碼
AD_Column.Description: Last issued invoice number

AD_Column.Name: 最後開立日期
AD_Column.Description: Date of the last issued invoice in this prefix range

AD_Column.Name: 狀態
AD_Column.Description: Invoice prefix status: I=Inactive, A=Active, C=Complete

AD_Table.Name: Taiwan Invoice Prefix Map 發票對應
AD_Table.Description: Maps iDempiere invoices to Taiwan invoice prefix and number

AD_Column.Name: 發票字軌
AD_Column.Description: FK to TW_InvoicePrefix

AD_Column.Name: 發票
AD_Column.Description: FK to C_Invoice

AD_Column.Name: 發票日期
AD_Column.Description: Date the invoice was issued

AD_Column.Name: 發票號碼
AD_Column.Description: Full invoice number (prefix + 8 digits)

AD_Column.Name: 買方統一編號
AD_Column.Description: Buyer tax ID (required for B2B tripart invoices)

AD_Column.Name: 到期警示
AD_Column.Description: Whether expiry warning has been issued for this invoice

AD_Table.Name: Taiwan Invoice Adjustment 進項折讓
AD_Table.Description: Taiwan sales and purchase invoice adjustments (returns and allowances)

AD_Column.Name: 原始發票
AD_Column.Description: FK to original C_Invoice (optional)

AD_Column.Name: 折讓類型
AD_Column.Description: Adjustment type: Return or Allowance

AD_Column.Name: 折讓方向
AD_Column.Description: Sales (outgoing) or Purchase (incoming) adjustment

AD_Column.Name: 折讓日期
AD_Column.Description: Date the adjustment was made

AD_Column.Name: 折讓稅額
AD_Column.Description: Tax amount being adjusted

AD_Column.Name: 申報期別
AD_Column.Description: Bimonthly filing period for this adjustment

AD_Column.Name: 超期申報
AD_Column.Description: Whether this adjustment is filed outside the original tax period

AD_Table.Name: Taiwan Tax Statement 401申報表
AD_Table.Description: Taiwan Form 401 Business Tax Return (bimonthly VAT filing)

AD_Column.Name: 申報年度
AD_Column.Description: Year of the tax statement

AD_Column.Name: 申報期別
AD_Column.Description: Bimonthly filing period (1-6)

AD_Column.Name: 應稅銷售額
AD_Column.Description: Total taxable revenue for the period

AD_Column.Name: 零稅率銷售額
AD_Column.Description: Zero-rate sales amount (exports); eligible for tax refund

AD_Column.Name: 免稅銷售額
AD_Column.Description: Exempt revenue (not subject to VAT)

AD_Column.Name: 銷項稅額
AD_Column.Description: Output VAT amount (5% of taxable revenue)

AD_Column.Name: 進項稅額
AD_Column.Description: Deductible input VAT amount

AD_Column.Name: 不可扣抵進項稅額
AD_Column.Description: Non-deductible input tax (e.g., entertainment expenses)

AD_Column.Name: 上期留抵稅額
AD_Column.Description: Carry-over tax credit from previous period

AD_Column.Name: 應稅比率
AD_Column.Description: Ratio of taxable to total revenue (for mixed business)

AD_Column.Name: 調整後進項稅額
AD_Column.Description: Input tax after mixed-business ratio adjustment

AD_Column.Name: 應納稅額
AD_Column.Description: Net tax payable (or refundable) for the period

AD_Column.Name: 兼營業者
AD_Column.Description: Whether this entity engages in both taxable and exempt business

AD_Column.Name: 申報截止日
AD_Column.Description: Filing due date for this tax period

AD_Window.Name: Taiwan Invoice Prefix 發票字軌管理
AD_Window.Description: Manage Taiwan Ministry of Finance assigned invoice prefix ranges

AD_Window.Name: Taiwan Invoice Prefix Map 發票對應管理
AD_Window.Description: Maps iDempiere invoices to Taiwan invoice prefix and number

AD_Window.Name: Taiwan Invoice Adjustment 進項折讓管理
AD_Window.Description: Taiwan sales and purchase invoice adjustments

AD_Menu.Name: Taiwan Invoice Prefix 發票字軌
Taiwan Invoice Prefix Map 發票對應
AD_Menu.Description: View Taiwan invoice to prefix mapping

AD_Menu.Name: Taiwan Invoice Adjustment 進項折讓
